title: Just Enough VH
description: Compatability between Vault Hunters and JEI
body:
A compatability mod between the_vault and Just Enough Items (JEI)

This mod is completely config-driven, meaning it should be forwards compatable with new updates of Vault Hunters. Currently includes support for ther following categories:

- Catalyst Infusion Table (Overrides included outdated recipe)
- Vault Forge (Vault Gear and Trinkets)
- Inscription Table
- Tool Station (Vault Tools and Jewels)
- Mystery Eggs
- Hostile Mystery Eggs
- Black Market
- Mod Boxes
- Mystery Boxes
- Bounty Rewards
- Vault Altar Ingredients
